spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates superellipse() animation endpoints, discrete named values, easing controls, and malformed animation target rejection.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes a malformed-target control that attempts corner-shape: superellipse(foo) on the animated sample and reports CSSOM rejection.

references.rationale: The see-also section now cites https://chromestatus.com/feature/5357329815699456 and the CSS Borders 4 corner-shape spec.

design_system.rationale: Static scan found no raw hex values, source inline style attributes, inline handlers, or DOM markup assignment; button background overrides remain paired with color overrides.

summary: Repaired with Chrome 148 / chrome-devtools-mcp verification. Pause/play, speed control, easing demos, and keyframe animation remain interactive; the new malformed-target path verifies parser rejection; source inline style/handler issues were removed; and the required ChromeStatus/spec references are present.
